title: Indulgent Thai Tofu Grill
description: A bitter, silky Thai tofu dish finished on the grill, using vegan white wine vinegar for a tangy glaze, perfect for a diabetic-friendly vegan dinner.
instructions: Drain tofu and press with a clean towel to remove excess moisture for 30 minutes.

In a bowl, whisk together vegan white wine vinegar, soy sauce, lime juice, sesame oil, minced garlic, grated ginger, ground cumin, ground coriander, chili powder, and a pinch of salt to create the glaze.
Place the pressed tofu slabs in the glaze and refrigerate for 15 minutes, turning the pieces halfway through to coat evenly.
Preheat a grill pan or outdoor grill to medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate with a paper towel soaked in oil.
Grill tofu slabs for 3-4 minutes per side until grill marks appear and tofu is heated through.
Remove tofu from the grill and let rest for 2 minutes before slicing into bite-sized pieces.
Drizzle any remaining glaze over the grilled tofu and garnish with chopped cilantro and a sprinkle of lime zest.
Serve immediately as a main dish with a side of steamed jasmine rice or a green salad.
